summary: 3D globe application with UTC timezone display and local time indicators
architectural_notes: 3D globe visualization is a core component
UI layout must remain unchanged except for specified timezone display features

existing_features.title: In WebsiteLayoutPanel, modify the local time display format to show the UTC offset within the date string (e.g., 'February 24, 2026 (UTC +8)' instead of separate UTC+8 label). The XPath for the element to modify is /html[1]/body[1]/div[3]/div[2]/div[2]/div[2]/div[1]/div[2]/div[2]/div[1]/strong[3].

In LocationMapExplorer, add a display above the 'Select UTC Offset' button that shows the current local time and its UTC offset in the same format as REQ-1 (e.g., 'Local Time: February 24, 2026 (UTC +8)'). The XPath for reference is /html[1]/body[1]/div[3]/div[2]/div[2]/div[2]/div[1]/div[2]/div[2]/div[1]/strong[2].

new_feature_requests.summary: Display local time with UTC offset (e.g., 'February 24, 2026 (UTC +8)')
Show local time and UTC offset above UTC Offset Selection

projectName: Update UTC timezone display format and add local time above UTC Offset Selection
